title: casting strings with more than one trailing zero ('0') to decimal goes wrong
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_decimal (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value REAL);
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, value) VALUES (1, CAST('100.000' AS REAL));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, value) VALUES (2, CAST('100.010' AS REAL));
INSERT INTO test_decimal (id, value) VALUES (3, CAST('100.100' AS REAL));
SELECT id, value FROM test_decimal WHERE value = CAST('100.000' AS REAL);
key_bug_features: casting strings with trailing zeros to decimal
